# NexusClaw
> Ultra-Lightweight Secure AI Agent with Browser Control.

## Core Files
- [src/cli/index.ts]: Main CLI entrypoint
- [src/server/api.ts]: Fastify API REST routes and WebSockets
- [src/agent/loop.ts]: Core AI iteration loop
- [ui-src/src/App.tsx]: Dashboard Frontend Application

## Key Concepts
- **Playwright Browser**: Agents use Playwright directly without external API dependencies.
- **Zero-Trust**: Hardcoded domain blacklists and structural shell command blocks.
- **Encrypted Session**: Vaults are AES-256-GCM encrypted per user.
- **Dual Memory**: Short-term exact context + Long-term embeddings array for recall.
- **Agent Sandbox**: The agent is restricted to working in designated system limits.
